frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields valid; description ~747 chars (under 1024 ceiling, over 200-char target); empty owns block unusual for non-agent workflow

description_quality.notes: Action verb 'Find', 8+ trigger phrases, pushy and domain-specific; could trim methodology preamble

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 66 lines; two references linked with when-to-read guidance; no duplication

instruction_clarity.notes: 6 numbered imperative steps with WHY, explicit output template, explicit 'do not skip to interface design' guardrail

coordination.notes: All three composes_with targets exist; handoff to grill-me and maintain-context explicit in process; agent-role fields declared empty unnecessarily

completeness.notes: Both refs exist, both linked, content matches; thorough examples

anti_patterns.notes: No hardcoded paths, no excessive MUST/NEVER, no duplication, no kitchen-sink, allowed-tools match needs

important.fix: Trim methodology preamble; keep trigger keywords

nits.item: Empty owns block with shared_read:['*'] on non-agent workflow

top_fixes.fix: Trim description to ≤200 chars by removing methodology preamble; keep trigger keywords and action verb
Remove agent-role owns block (this is a workflow, not an agent role)
Add attribution URLs for Ousterhout's APoSD and mattpocock's LANGUAGE.md
